title: Bruno Mathsson – Pernilla Lounge Chair
description: A Pernilla lounge chair designed by Bruno Mathsson, featuring a bentwood frame with woven support. Known for its ergonomic form and light construction.

title: Hans J. Wegner – AP-33 Sofa
description: A mid-20th-century sofa designed by Hans J. Wegner for AP Stolen, combining solid wood structure with upholstered seating and restrained proportions.
